entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: Production of food in a way that ensures long-term availability and security

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: HUMAN POPULATION
entities.description: The global population requiring food and nutritional security

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area, traditionally the primary interest of agricultural production

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A public health problem characterized by a lack of essential nutrients, also referred to as hidden hunger

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of breeding nutrients into food crops to provide a sustainable means of delivering micronutrients

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Plants known for high protein content and richness in key micronutrients

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein present in a crop, which is higher in legumes than in cereals

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grass-based food crops used as a comparison for protein content against legumes

entities.name: FOLATE
entities.description: A key micronutrient found in legumes

entities.name: NIACIN
entities.description: A key micronutrient found in legumes

entities.name: THIAMINE
entities.description: A key micronutrient found in legumes

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: A key micronutrient found in legumes

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A key micronutrient found in legumes

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A key micronutrient found in legumes

entities.name: GENOMIC AND GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Biological materials and data used to enhance food security

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING APPROACHES
entities.description: Traditional methods of crossing plants to improve nutritional traits

entities.name: MODERN BREEDING APPROACHES
entities.description: Advanced techniques used to improve nutritional traits in crops

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The quality and quantity of nutrients in food relevant to human health

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of a plant that affect its performance and productivity in the field

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGICAL INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: The use of biotechnology to modify crop characteristics for improved nutrition

entities.name: HUMAN HEALTH
entities.description: The overall state of physical and mental well-being influenced by nutrition
